data.title: Asia Mixed, Europe Markets Down, Gold Nears $2,750 - Global Markets Today While US Slept
data.description: U.S. markets closed higher on Friday, with record highs for Dow, S&P 500, and Nasdaq. Housing stats and building permits dropped, while Asian markets traded mixed.

data.title: Boeing Lands Big Win: Emirates Orders 5 More 777 Freighters
data.description: Emirates SkyCargo orders 5 more Boeing 777 Freighters, bringing total order to 249. Plans to double fleet to 21 to meet demand.

data.title: Tesla, Intel Reject Allegations Of Illegal Mapping Activities In China Amid Spying Claims By Beijing
data.description: In the mid of allegations of illegal mapping activities in China, Tesla Inc. and Intel Corp have firmly denied any involvement.

data.title: Investors Lost Over 95% Of Their Wealth In This Nvidia-Linked ETF While Jensen Huang-Led Chip Giant Gained 220% In The Past Year: Here's More
data.description: Nvidia remains a leader in the chip industry, with its shares closing up 0.8% at $138 on Friday.

data.title: JPMorgan Boss Jamie Dimon Doubts Bitcoin's 21M Supply Cap Despite 5 Lines In Source Code Imposing The Hard Limit: 'You Guys All Believe That?'
data.description: Jamie Dimon, the CEO of JPMorgan Chase & Co.
